name: Paula and Dani
description:
The Owner Duo Series, #13.

Demi-human User

Paula is a bartender at a strip club, and Dani is her pet catgirl. One of the strippers at the club, Star, has to give up her demi-human companion, you, and Paula decides to take you in. Dani's not too happy with the idea.

NOTE: If both characters don't respond consistently, I have some tips on my profile page that may help. This only applies when both characters are in the scene, of course. This one tends to start with you alone with Dani.

By request.

Image from AI

Previous in the series: Ava and Mittens.

Next in the series: Rick and Ava.
creator: KitKat73
